channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Rulings signal US courts may be more open to lawsuits accusing foreign officials of abuses
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A U.S. court has given two top associates of Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman until early November to start turning over any evidence in a lawsuit from a former senior Saudi intelligence official who says he survived a plot by the kingdom to silence him.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Geraldo Rivera endorses Harris, says Trump 'unfit'
item.description: NewsNation correspondent-at-large Geraldo Rivera said Monday that he's endorsing Kamala Harris for president.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Harris plays mashup of Trump’s 'enemy within' comments at Erie rally, shortly after crowd chants 'lock him up'
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris spoke before an arena in Erie, Pennsylvania, where she queued up a montage of Donald Trump speaking about "enemies within.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris announces a new plan to empower Black men as she tries to energize them to vote for her
item.description: ERIE, Pa. (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris announced a plan on Monday to give Black men more economic opportunities and other chances to thrive as she works to energize a key voting bloc that has Democrats concerned about a lack of enthusiasm.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's economic plans would worsen inflation, experts say
item.description: Donald Trump has vowed that if voters return him to the White House, “inflation will vanish completely.”.
item.dc:creator: Paul Wiseman And Christopher Rugaber, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kamala Harris will sit down with Bret Baier for her first Fox News interview
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris will be interviewed by Fox News anchor Bret Baier on Wednesday in Pennsylvania as she steps up her travel and conversations with media outlets in the closing stretch of the presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sending a THAAD air defense system to Israel adds to strain on US Army forces
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The deployment of a U.S. Terminal High Altitude Area Defense battery to Israel and roughly 100 soldiers to operate it will add to already difficult strains on the Army's air defense forces and potential delays in modernizing its missile defense systems, Army leaders said Monday.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NJ lawmakers' fight against teen vaping continues with new bill
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (PIX11) -- The fight against youth vaping continues in the Garden State as some Trenton lawmakers are trying to pass a law prohibiting the delivery of electronic smoking devices to people under 21, requiring someone over 21 to sign off on the delivery.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: With hunting party, Walz invites moderate male voters into the fold
item.description: Independent voter David Clayton joined Gov. Tim Walz at Saturday’s pheasant opener and says he’s sold on voting for the Harris-Walz ticket. He thinks others may be, too, but aren’t talking about it. “There are many, many MAGA-minded Americans who aren’t really so MAGA-minded.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer, Megan Burks, and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Johnson announces $27.5M third-quarter fundraising in record for Speaker
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) announced a $27.5 million fundraising haul for the third quarter of the year, a sum that is welcome news for Republicans hoping to keep control of the House as they enter the final stretch of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Afghan charged with Election Day terror plot raises questions, fears from lawmakers: ‘This is real’
item.description: An Election Day terror plot, allegedly being planned by an Afghan national who came to the U.S. in 2021, is raising new concerns about the numbers brought to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Native Voters could swing Arizona. Both parties want their votes.
item.description: Both Republicans and Democrats are trying to marshal Native American voters in Arizona, which could prove decisive to winning the key state.
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo, MPR News

item.title: Republicans pour money into Wisconsin Senate race Democrats say will be close
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Sensing an opportunity in swing-state Wisconsin, Republicans are pouring money into the bid to unseat incumbent Democratic Sen. Tammy Baldwin in that state's closely watched Senate race.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Will Donald Trump and Kamala Harris debate again?
item.description: While there was originally talk of more than one meeting between Trump and Harris, the former president made his intentions clear with a post on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio GOP Senate challenger reacts to polls showing dead heat in critical Senate race: 'Radical liberal'
item.description: Fox News Digital spoke to Ohio GOP Sen. candidate Bernie Moreno about why polls are trending in his direction in his highly watched race that could determine Senate control.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Election 2024: Races to watch in New Jersey
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PX11) -- It's been one of the most notable years for New Jersey politics in recent memory — indictments, upsets, and loss are just some themes of what has been a year that could shape the Garden State's political future for years to come.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Armed man arrested near Trump rally denies 'assassination attempt' claims
item.description: “I’m an artist, I’m the last person that would cause any violence and harm to anybody,” the man has since said.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Clyburn calls Project 2025 a 'Jim Crow 2.0'
item.description: Rep. James Clyburn (D-S.C.) on Sunday called the conservative policy agenda Project 2025 a “Jim Crow 2.0.” Clyburn said on CNN's "State of the Union" that he was the ninth Black lawmaker elected to Congress from South Carolina — almost 100 years after the previous Black lawmaker was elected.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Trump suggests using National Guard, military against 'enemy from within'
item.description: Former President Donald Trump in a Sunday interview suggested using the National Guard or the military on Election Day to combat what he described as potential chaos from “the enemy from within” – a group that Trump said includes “radical left lunatics.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate rankings: 5 seats most likely to flip
item.description: The battle for the Senate majority has hit its final month as Republicans race to end their four-year stint in the minority. The GOP needs to win only one of two competitive races in red states — Montana and Ohio — to do just that, barring a surprise loss elsewhere.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, Fox 5

item.title: In outreach to Black men, Harris to vow to legalize weed, protect crypto
item.description: Polls show that some Black men may be gravitating toward former President Trump or not vote at all. Vice President Harris and other prominent Democrats are trying to counter that.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram, MPR News

item.title: What we know about arrest outside Trump’s California rally
item.description: Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco, a noted supporter of Trump, discussed safety measures taken at the Saturday event.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Democratic voter registration raises red flags for Harris
item.description: Voter registration shifts in key battleground states are raising concerns for Democrats and suggesting Vice President Harris faces challenges in Pennsylvania, North Carolina, Arizona and Nevada.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Man with loaded gun arrested at checkpoint near Donald Trump's weekend rally in Southern California
item.description: Authorities say a Nevada man with a shotgun and a loaded handgun in his vehicle was arrested at a security checkpoint outside Donald Trump’s rally Saturday night in the Southern California desert.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Vance doesn't say where patients will get care if Planned Parenthood is defunded
item.description: Ohio Sen. JD Vance (R), former President Trump's running mate, on Sunday didn't say where patients would go for health screenings, checkups and more if Planned Parenthood is defunded.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Scully, NewsNation

item.title: Trump tells protester to 'go back home to Mommy' during rally
item.description: Trump called for the protester to “get the hell knocked out of her,” his latest instance of using violent language when confronted by demonstrators.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Few Americans believe Donald Trump will concede election: Poll
item.description: In a tightly contested election, the confidence of voters for their chosen candidate concede varies along party lines
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Johnson: Additional hurricane aid 'can wait' until Congress is back in session
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Sunday said passing additional hurricane aid for states impacted by Hurricanes Helene and Milton “can wait” until Congress is back in session after the election.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Inside the TikTok documents: Stripping teens and boosting ‘attractive’ people
item.description: A trove of secret documents show teens’ increasingly reliant on TikTok and how executives were acutely aware of the potential harm the app can cause young people, but appeared unconcerned.
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn, Sylvia Goodman, and Dara Kerr, MPR News

item.title: This year's 'October surprise' may be no surprise at all
item.description: It is not uncommon for political commentators to call a late-breaking story during a presidential election an "October surprise" — even when there is little evidence that it mattered all that much.
item.dc:creator: Ron Elving, MPR News

item.title: Michigan newspaper issues correction after Trump claims he won Man of Year award
item.description: A Michigan newspaper issued a correction after former President Donald Trump cited the paper at a speech in Detroit claiming he was Michigan’s “Man of the Year” in 2023.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Emily Stevens discusses accountability, safety, and fiscal responsibility on the Clark County School District Board
item.description: Emily Stevens, candidate for the Clark County School District Board of Trustees, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to discuss why she believes she's the right fit for the open seat in District A.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lombardo among GOP governors criticizing Biden-Harris immigration asylum actions
item.description: Gov. Joe Lombardo was among 25 Republican governors who signed a letter criticizing the Biden-Harris administration over asylum policies that have brought more than a half-million immigrants into the United States.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Melania Trump waves off 'hand-swatting incident': A 'mere misunderstanding'
item.description: Melania Trump is waving off speculation that she didn't want to hold her husband's hand, chalking up images of her seemingly "swatting" away former President Donald Trump to a "mere misunderstanding.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: DeSantis pushes back on 'delusional' Harris remark about Hurricane Milton calls
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Monday that it was “delusional” for Vice President Kamala Harris to accuse him of “political gamesmanship” after reports emerged that he did not take the Democratic presidential nominee’s calls as his state braces for Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Harris reveals owning a Glock: 'Of course' I've fired it
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris said in a "60 Minutes" interview that aired Monday that she owns a Glock and has fired it at a shooting range in another example of how she and her campaign have made a point to highlight her gun ownership.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5
